en.title: IT Specialist (InfoSec)
en.subtitle: IT Audit • GRC • Cyber Compliance
en.text: Validated security controls, access management processes, vulnerability remediation, and compliance documentation for Department of Defense IT environments, strengthening audit readiness across STIG, RMF, and NIST-aligned control expectations.
list: Reviewed endpoint and system compliance against STIG requirements, security baselines, and DoD configuration standards.
Conducted vulnerability management activities using ACAS and Nessus outputs to evaluate findings, track remediation, and reduce compliance risk.
Managed access control activities, account governance, and user access review documentation for military IT systems.
Maintained audit-ready evidence, remediation notes, and compliance artifacts for review in tools and workflows aligned with eMASS, RMF, NIST 800-53, and NIST 800-171.
Coordinated Microsoft Intune and Microsoft 365 compliance operations involving endpoint security, access controls, and policy enforcement.

en.title: Aviation Operations Specialist / Battle NCO
en.subtitle: Audit Readiness • GRC • Risk Management
en.text: Managed aviation operations tracking, mission documentation, readiness reporting, and inspection-driven compliance activities in a Department of Defense environment requiring procedural discipline and risk awareness.
list: Maintained operational records, mission data, and readiness documentation used for inspections, command reporting, and compliance validation.
Coordinated time-sensitive operational information across teams while preserving accuracy, accountability, and chain-of-command visibility.
Conducted documentation reviews to identify gaps, validate required information, and strengthen inspection readiness.
Tracked issues, status updates, and corrective actions through completion to maintain operational continuity and reduce risk.
Executed compliance-focused procedures in a structured military environment aligned with security, readiness, and mission assurance requirements.

en.title: HR Assistant (MIL)
en.subtitle: Access Controls • Compliance Operations • GRC
en.text: Managed personnel records, access-related documentation, compliance workflows, and administrative controls in a military environment requiring accuracy, accountability, and protection of sensitive information.
list: Reviewed personnel documentation, eligibility records, and administrative data for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with military requirements.
Maintained controlled records and evidence supporting inspections, internal reviews, personnel actions, and access-related decisions.
Coordinated onboarding, role and status updates, and record changes requiring disciplined identity, access, and authorization tracking.
Executed documentation and compliance operations involving sensitive personnel information, deadlines, approvals, and audit-ready recordkeeping.
Strengthened operational accountability by tracking discrepancies, resolving documentation gaps, and maintaining organized evidence for leadership review.
